name: north-star
description: Design skills toolkit for Claude Code. Formalize and maintain a system's conceptual target design by altitude (NEED → CONCEPT → SOLUTION) as living design-as-context, written as structured prose with Mermaid diagrams. Skills: framing-the-need (NEED layer — vision, impact, boundary capabilities), modeling-the-domain (CONCEPT layer — ubiquitous language + conceptual domain model), designing-by-altitude (SOLUTION layer — North Star + subsystem designs) and narrating-the-flow (the flow axis — narrative, entity lifecycle and domain events).
